text: Instead of 'me' have it be either assigned to human or agent. So the way slash commands work, we can allow for @ tags as well - Typing @ should bring up dropdown option to choose human or agent and assign it accordingly - with icons to match. User icon for human and robot icon for agent
When typing '#' bring up a combobox to allow choosing from existing tags - faster and no typos...
Design + write real landing content (hero, live outline demo island, install, agent story) #landing
Deploy landing to kalamu.dev (CF Pages or Vercel, root dir packages/landing) + DNS at registrar #landing
